steps: Resuspend 30µl (15 µg) coating antibody (Anti-IL-8 Antibody IL-8 Human 554716 Pharmingen, 0,5µg/µl) in 5 ml Coating buffer (100 mM Na2HPO4 pH 9,6) Pipette 50µl of antibody solution in each well of a Nunc MaxiSorp® flat-bottom 96 well plate. Take care to cover the whole surface of each well with the solution. Incubate at 4°C for minimum 8 hours Purified Mouse Anti-Human IL-8 Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #554716
Remove the unbound antibody, washing twice with 200 µl/well washing buffer (PBS 0,05% Tween 20 (v/v))
Add 100µl to each well a PBS 10% FBS solution for blocking, for minimum 1 hour at 37°C or 2 hours at room temperature. Fetal Bovine Serum Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10270106
Remove blocking solution and wash well twice with 200µl Wash buffer per well.
Add standard solutions (100µl / well) Prepare samples by mixing throughly before loading them onto the plate. (final volume per well: 100 µl).
Incubate samples for minimum 5 hours at 37°C, or overnight at 4°C. Do not shake.
Remove thoroughly the samples by washing 6 times with 200 µl wash buffer / well.

30 minutes before the incubation of the detection antibody is ready, prepare the POX -Streptavidin complex, by mixing 1,5µl of solution A and 1,5µl of solution B (Vectastain ABC kit, Catalog Number: PK-4000) in 200µl ELISA buffer . Vortex shortly to mix and incubate for 30 min at room temperature. VECTASTAIN ABC HRP Kit (Peroxidase, Standard) Vector Laboratories Catalog # PK-4000
Once the incubation of the biotinylated antibody is ready, remove all unbound antibody from plate by washing 6 times as described before
Prepare the POX-Streptavidin solution by diluting the 200 µl previously prepared in 10 ml of ELISA buffer (50 mM TRIS-HCL pH 7,6). MIX BY INVERSION ONLY. Do not vortex.
Add 100µl of the POX-Strep complex solution in each well. Incubate for 45 min at room temperature. Do not vortex the POX-Step complex.

Remove the unbound complex, by washing as previously described 6 times. Develop using a TMB substrate (5 ml Solution A + 5 ml Solution B), 100 µl per well, and stop reaction using 50 µl of a 1M H 2 SO 4 . Read in Wavelength described by TMB substrate instructions. TMB Substrate Reagent Set Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #555214

Add 100µl/well of a solution of 10µg biotinylated IL-8 antibody (BD Biosciences, Catalog No.554718) in 10 ml wash buffer 10% FBS, and incubate for minimum 45 min at 37°C, or 2 hours at room temperature. Biotin Mouse Anti-Human IL-8 Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #554718
creator: Luisa F Jimenez-Soto
